g.text: All plotted rows: complete=true, seed_count=3; ASTRA baseline is the paired current-basis reference.

text.style: font-size: 6.8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Serif'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #3e4448

g.text: Measured sweeps support bounded operating points only; both mechanisms retain visible accuracy tradeoffs.
